actions.description: Added shared drawGameOverOverlay(ctx, opts) function to index.html before game scripts. Renders unified game-over overlay with accent title, score, high-score, new-best celebration, and restart hint. All using design system colors (#e94560, #4ade80, #facc15, #888, #fff).
Requested R&D integrate drawGameOverOverlay() into all 7 games, replacing per-game custom overlays.

healthCheck: 200 OK on localhost:3000, function confirmed in served HTML
nextStep: Awaiting R&D per-game integration. Next pipeline item: loading-skeleton-states or mobile-touch-support BUILD.
